meta.title: (Previously) LIVE from SpaceX CRS 12!
meta.description:
Tim Dodd the Everyday Astronaut live from the Causeway for SoaceX/NASA mission CRS-12, resupplying the International Space Station. 

Sorry for the vertical video, the app made me do it :/ 

Show your support via Patreon! http://Patreon.com/everydayastronaut
